MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Denise Campos.
Attorney Bill Ford appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Couvson is present.
Attorney Teresa Lynn Friend representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Toni Young, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Jan. 14, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
